description:
🕒 09:30–12:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-hannouv-onedaymarch/

This walk follows the roughly 10 km course from last year's Hanno New Green Two-Day March. You'll enjoy a guided tour of Hanno's rich natural attractions, visiting Hanno River, Tenranzan, Azuma Gorge, Asahi Mountain, and more as you experience the pleasant new greenery season.

【Fee】Adults ¥1,000 | Students ¥500
【Capacity】50 people
【Guide】Saitama Hanno University staff
【What to bring】Drinking water, rain gear if weather requires it
【Note】Saitama Hanno University website: https://hanno-univ.net/
location: 集合 NPO法人埼玉ハンノウ大学事務局 （飯能市仲町6-1(旧飯能織物協同組合事務所棟) 西武池袋線飯能駅下車徒歩7分
summary: Casual New Green One-Day March – Enjoy Hanno as a Forest Culture City
